description: Le Figaro is a French news and media group that operates the main Le Figaro publication and related vertical services, including Figaro Immobilier for real-estate listings and advice.
summary: lefigaro.fr exposes a public MCP server for Figaro Immobilier at https://immobilier.lefigaro.fr/mcp; no public HTTP APIs, GraphQL endpoints, or CLIs were found for the domain.
